description_long: This is a classic submachine gun with a robust black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by polished wooden furniture including the stock, foregrip, and pistol grip. The rifle features a straight, ribbed barrel with a simple cylindrical muzzle device at the end. The wooden stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped, while the foregrip is vertical and contoured for a secure hold. A detachable box magazine is inserted in front of the trigger guard, and the rifle is equipped with basic iron sights for aiming. The overall design is iconic, reminiscent of early 20th-century military and law enforcement firearms, with a blend of utilitarian metalwork and traditional wood craftsmanship.
description: A classic submachine gun with a black metal body, ribbed barrel, and polished wooden stock, foregrip, and pistol grip. It features a detachable box magazine and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, vertical foregrip, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view showing the circular muzzle, ribbed barrel, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden components and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the back of the receiver.
